summary: Reviewers flag a date mismatch for this recording but still regard the Dec 16 1992 show as solid, with no details on audio quality.
review: Two reviewers note that the material actually dates from December 16 1992 rather than the 1986 label, calling it a "good show" and even a Dick’s Pick. No specific comments about soundboard or audience source are provided, so the technical quality remains unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: One reviewer is critical of the mis‑dated source (0 stars) while the other praises the performance; lack of audio details limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit remarks on clarity, mix, or source type; only a note that the music appears to be from six years later than the label suggests.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed commentary on set structure or song flow was given.
